events.summary: Phase 0 (Research) opened. Cross-repo Feature (fitme-story dashboard auth + FitTracker2 audit-log sync). Replaces basic-auth on /control-room/* with WebAuthn/passkeys. Surfaced from UCC T2.5 deferral.
Phase 0 (Research) complete. 14-section research.md synthesized via parallel agents. Library decision: @simplewebauthn/{server,browser} v13. 7 open-question defaults locked.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened. Drafting against 7 locked default decisions: existing-operator-required for subsequent bootstrap; lockout N=5 M=15min; 24h+12h sliding session; desktop-first only; log every event; daily GHA sync; conditional-UI autofill enabled.

PRD drafted with 15 sections. Primary metric: 0 unauthenticated /control-room/* reads/day. 3 kill criteria. 7 locked decisions baked in. 10 GA4 events + 4 screens defined; analytics_spec_complete=true. 24-task estimate across 6 blocks. Cross-repo: ~14 fitme-story files + ~3 FT2 files + new GHA workflow.

Phase 1 complete. PRD approved with 7 locked decisions, primary T1 metric (0 unauthenticated reads), 3 kill criteria, 10 GA4 events + 4 screens validated, 5-phase migration plan with rollback at every step.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. 28 tasks decomposed across 8 blocks (A auth-server, B KV, C API routes, D sign-in UI, E admin UI, F sync+CLI+panel, G tests, H docs). Lane split: 16 E-core (sonnet parallel) + 12 P-core (opus serial).

tasks.md drafted with 28 tasks + dependency graph + 4-wave dispatch order. Estimated total effort 11.5 days (1.5-2 weeks calendar). All tasks scored against task-complexity gate; lane assignments locked.

Phase 3 artifacts complete. ux-research.md (7 sections incl. iOS HIG/auth-polish-v2 references). ux-spec.md (5 screens × 5 states + tokens/components/patterns inventory). UX preflight PASS (12 tokens + 5 components + 4 new paths free; 0 P0). Design preflight PASS (Figma MCP live; defer-to-portable-prompt because dashboard has no Figma mapping). UX + design build prompts written. figma-bridge-status.json recorded.
Phase 3 complete. UX/Integration: 7-section ux-research + 5-screen ux-spec + UX preflight PASS + design preflight PASS (Figma MCP live, deferred to portable prompt) + ux/design build prompts.

Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Cross-repo: feature/ucc-passkey-auth branch on both FT2 worktree (already isolated) + fitme-story (just branched). 4-wave dispatch begins with Wave 1 E-core parallel (T2 T4 T6 T7 T11 T23 T28).
Phase 4 complete. 28/28 tasks done across both repos. fitme-story: 22 new + 3 edited; FT2: 2 new. 5 unit-test files. Vercel Cron + GHA cross-repo sync wired. proxy.ts switches on UCC_AUTH_MODE.
Phase 5 (Testing) opened. Plan: pnpm install in fitme-story → tsc --noEmit → pnpm lint → pnpm test (the 5 new unit-test files).
Phase 5 complete. tsc 0 errors on feature files. 19/19 tests pass. next build clean. Caught + fixed iron-session garbage-input bug.
Phase 6 (Review) opened. Running /ux pre-merge-review + /design pre-merge-review + risk audit.

Pre-merge review PASS. UX: 0 P0, 0 P1, 1 P2 (optional pulse animation deferred). Design: PASS_WITH_NOTES (Figma N/A by design — portable prompt is the v4.X escape hatch). Risk audit identified 3 surfaces all mitigated.
Phase 6 complete. UX pre-merge review PASS (0 P0). Design pre-merge review PASS_WITH_NOTES (Figma N/A by design). Risk audit identified 3 surfaces all mitigated. Phase 7 (Merge) approvable.
Phase 7 (Merge) opened. Committing FT2 worktree side; opening cross-repo PRs (fitme-story #cf656dc already committed; FT2 PR pending push).
auth-polish-v2:patterns (L2)
ux-spec-preflight:fitme-story-tokens (L2)
vercel-storage:upstash-redis-from-env (L3)
Phase 7 complete. fitme-story PR #55 merged (squash 5362f8f). FT2 PR #248 merged (squash e5a7c45). Both branches deleted post-merge.
Phase 8 (Documentation) opened. Drafting source case study + showcase MDX slot 26.
Phase 8 complete. Source case study + showcase MDX (slot 26) drafted with full v7.8.1 frontmatter compliance.

Feature complete. Total measured wall time 125 min across 9 phase transitions. 28/28 tasks done. 19/19 tests pass. 2 PRs merged (fitme-story #55, FT2 #248). FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate satisfied: 7 frontmatter fields + Q7 kill_criteria_resolution + Q6 PR parity all present.
